ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of source (e.g., online news, print media) */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin of the source */,
  "language" TEXT /* Primary language of the source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each article */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the source of the article */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the article */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the article */,
  "date_published" TEXT /* Date the article was published */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the article */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the article */,
  "word_count" INTEGER /* Word count of the article */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the article's main image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_articles_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industries" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the industry */,
  "industry_code" TEXT /* Standardized industry code (e.g., SIC, NAICS) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_industries" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the industry */,
  "relevance_score" REAL /* Relevance score indicating how well the article belongs to the industry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id", "industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sentiments" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article */,
  "sentiment" TEXT /* Sentiment of the article (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  "confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the sentiment analysis */,
  "sentiment_type" TEXT /* Type of sentiment analysis (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  "aspect" TEXT /* Aspect of the article being analyzed (e.g., company, product, service) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, administrator, subscriber) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_views" (
  "view_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each view event */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article being viewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user viewing the article */,
  "view_date" TEXT /* Date when the article was viewed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user viewing the article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("view_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_views_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_views_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_searches" (
  "search_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each search event */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article being searched */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user searching the article */,
  "search_date" TEXT /* Date when the article was searched */,
  "search_query" TEXT /* Search query used by the user */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user searching the article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("search_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_searches_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_searches_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subscriptions" (
  "subscription_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subscription event */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article being subscribed to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user subscribing to the article */,
  "subscription_date" TEXT /* Date when the article was subscribed to */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user subscribing to the article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subscription_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subscriptions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subscriptions_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_urls" (
  "url_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each URL */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article the URL belongs to */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the article */,
  "hash_url" TEXT /* Hashed version of the URL */,
  "url_type" TEXT /* Type of URL (e.g., original, canonical, shortened) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("url_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_urls_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "opinion_sections" (
  "opinion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each opinion section */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article the opinion section belongs to */,
  "opinion" TEXT /* Opinion section of the article */,
  "section_type" TEXT /* Type of opinion section (e.g., editorial, op-ed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("opinion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_opinion_sections_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pages" (
  "page_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each page */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article the page belongs to */,
  "page_number" INTEGER /* Page number of the article */,
  "position_on_page" INTEGER /* Position on the page */,
  "page_size" INTEGER /* Size of the page in bytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("page_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pages_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "indexes" (
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each index */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article the index belongs to */,
  "index" INTEGER /* Index of the article */,
  "index_type" TEXT /* Type of index (e.g., keyword, author) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_indexes_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)
